summary: Frontend UI testing completed successfully. All requested features and pages are working correctly - login flow, Setoran Harian, War Room V2, Employees, Absensi, Payroll, Master ERP pages, and sidebar navigation all functioning as expected.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 404 errors during page transitions for some API calls (branches, employees, jabatan). These occur due to timing of auth token availability but don't affect functionality.

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend already tested by main agent

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend UI testing completed. All ERP pages (Setoran Harian, War Room V2, Employees, Absensi, Payroll, Master ERP) are working. Sidebar navigation with SUPER AI, Operasional, and HR & Payroll menus expand correctly. Login flow requires selecting OCB GROUP business first, then entering credentials.

login_flow.details: Select business (OCB GROUP) → Enter credentials → Redirected to dashboard

setoran_harian.details: Page loads with summary cards (Total Penjualan, Total Setoran, Total Minus, Total Plus, Jumlah Setoran), date filter, branch/status filters, data table with columns, Input Setoran button

war_room_v2.details: KPIs visible (Transaction, MTD target, Cabang setor, Kehadiran, Minus/Plus), Top 5 Cabang, Karyawan Bermasalah, AI Insights, Fraud Detection sections all displayed

employees_data_karyawan.details: Search input, filters (Cabang, Status), stats cards (Total Karyawan, Karyawan Tetap, Kontrak, Cabang), data table, Tambah Karyawan button

absensi.details: Quick Check-in section with employee selector and GPS, summary cards (Hadir, Telat, Alpha, Izin, Cuti, Sakit), filters, attendance table

payroll.details: Periode Payroll section, Buat Periode Baru button, period details area

master_erp.details: Tabs working: Shift, Jabatan, Lokasi Absensi, Aturan Payroll. Master Shift table with columns (Kode, Nama, Jam Masuk, Jam Pulang, Istirahat, Aksi), Tambah button

sidebar_navigation.details: SUPER AI menu expands (Warroom, War Room V2, AI Sales, Hallo OCB AI, AI Bisnis), Operasional menu expands (Setoran Harian, Selisih Kas, Dashboard ERP), HR & Payroll menu expands (Data Karyawan, Absensi, Payroll, Master Shift, Master Jabatan, Lokasi Absensi, Aturan Payroll)
